economic_notes: Nation has 30 Government Business Enterprises including oil/gas, catering, security, hotel, sawmill, casino, advertising, environmental, and oilfield services companies. GBE aggregate revenue was $113,398,306 in 2022. Nation provided guarantees of approximately $39,500,000 on GBE credit facilities with $34,000,000 outstanding. Nation earns oil and gas royalties and lease revenue through Primrose Lake Trust.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence on GBE investments and equity balances under modified equity method — same scope limitation applied to prior year 2021. Nation has 30 GBEs accounted for by modified equity method (not consolidated). Two entities fully consolidated: Cold Lake First Nations FNDF Corporation and Nu Ch'anie Society. Honoraria of $871,973 paid likely to elected officials/council but no formal remuneration schedule provided. Deferred revenue represents contributions carried forward to next year ($19,402,599). Total government transfers calculated as ISC + FNIHB + FNDF + Other government grants + Dene Ts'edi Society grants = $25,394,992 + $4,551,950 + $4,792,913 + $2,640,815 + $780,261 = $38,160,931; OSR = total revenue $43,442,193 minus $38,160,931 = $5,281,262. Note: Donations ($7,393,300) included in OSR as they are not government transfers. Recalculated: total_government_transfers = 25394992+4551950+4792913+2640815+780261 = 38160931, osr = 43442193-38160931 = 5281262. Values corrected in fields above. No remuneration schedule included in provided statements.
